title: Nesternity
subtitle: The Calmest CRM
description: All-in-one workspace for managing clients, projects, tasks, and invoices — from one calm, cozy hub. Built with drag-and-drop, real-time sync, and PDF generation.

title: MGNREGA India
subtitle: Data Visualization
description: Presents insights from India's MGNREGA employment scheme. Interactive charts and graphs across all states using the data.gov.in API, with voice input support.

title: Deckhand
subtitle: Remote Presentation Control
description: Control your slide decks from anywhere via WebSocket. Works as a mobile remote and teleprompter. Deployed on DigitalOcean with a custom socket backend.

title: Parathaful
subtitle: Concept Showcase
description: A bold concept showcase website featuring unique designs inspired by vibrant paratha culture. Heavy use of GSAP scroll-triggered animations.
